findings.title: GDPR Compliance Audit Blocker
findings.description: The PersonaLens profiling system requires a full GDPR compliance audit before launch, which is a critical blocker for the EU market. Key concerns include lawful basis for processing, consent mechanisms, data retention policies, right to erasure, and completion of a DPIA.
assumptions: Legal compliance is mandatory for EU market entry.

evidence.excerpt: GDPR compliance audit request... Key concerns: (1) lawful basis for processing behavioral data, (2) adequacy of consent mechanisms...

recommendations: Complete the GDPR compliance audit before proceeding with development.

findings.title: User Behavior Tracking Pipeline Dependency
findings.description: The implementation of the ML recommendation engine is dependent on the completion of the user behavior tracking pipeline, which must be able to handle at least 50k events/second.
assumptions: The data ingestion pipeline will be built as specified.

evidence.excerpt: Implement a data ingestion pipeline that captures browsing history, click patterns...

recommendations: Prioritize the development of the user behavior tracking pipeline.

findings.title: Phased Delivery Plan
findings.description: Propose a phased delivery plan: MVP should focus on the user behavior tracking pipeline and GDPR compliance. V1 should include the ML recommendation engine and user preference dashboard. V2 should add cross-device tracking and data export for advertisers.
assumptions: Phased delivery will allow for iterative testing and compliance checks.

evidence.excerpt: Build a recommendation engine that uses accumulated user profile data...

recommendations: Implement the phased delivery plan as outlined.

findings.title: Privacy Risks in User Tracking
findings.description: There are significant privacy risks associated with user behavior tracking and data sharing with advertisers. Legal has flagged potential re-identification issues with cohort-level data.
assumptions: User data will be anonymized effectively.

evidence.excerpt: Create an API and batch export system that shares anonymized user profile segments...
GDPR compliance audit request... individual re-identification may be possible.

recommendations: Enhance anonymization techniques and conduct thorough privacy assessments.

summary: The analysis highlights critical risks related to GDPR compliance and privacy, which are blockers for the project's launch. Dependencies on the user behavior tracking pipeline are essential for the recommendation engine, and a phased delivery plan is recommended to manage complexity and compliance effectively.
